name: cpt_recipe_v1
goal: Continue pretraining nanochat-d24 on a safe, high-value mixture for a 48-hour run.

backbone_dataset.notes: Use ClimbMix as the main pretraining backbone because it is already the best-performing dataset in this fork.

do_not_do: Do not attempt architecture changes during this 48-hour continuation run.
Do not rely on continued pretraining for current-events freshness.
